glosses.ja: 計算する; 算出する

sentences.target: Je calcule notre budget pour le mois.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kal.kyl nɔ.tʁə bydʒɛ puʁ lə mwa/

translations.fr: Je calcule notre budget pour le mois.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kal.kyl nɔ.tʁə bydʒɛ puʁ lə mwa/
translations.en: I'm calculating our budget for the month.
translations.es: Estoy calculando nuestro presupuesto para el mes.
translations.de: Ich berechne unser Budget für den Monat.
translations.it: Sto calcolando il nostro budget per il mese.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在计算我们这个月的预算。
translations.yue: 我喺計緊我哋今個月嘅預算。
translations.ru: Я рассчитываю наш бюджет на месяц.
translations.pt: Estou calculando nosso orçamento para o mês.
translations.he: אני מחשב את התקציב החודשי שלנו.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tính ngân sách tháng này của chúng ta.
translations.nl: Ik bereken ons budget voor deze maand.
translations.uk: Я розраховую наш бюджет на місяць.
translations.hi: मैं इस महीने का हमारा बजट निकाल रहा हूँ।
translations.pl: Liczę nasz budżet na ten miesiąc.
translations.el: Υπολογίζω τον προϋπολογισμό μας για τον μήνα.
translations.nb: Jeg beregner budsjettet vårt for denne måneden.
translations.id: Saya sedang menghitung anggaran kita untuk bulan ini.
translations.sv: Jag räknar ut vår budget för den här månaden.
translations.ro: Calculez bugetul nostru pentru luna aceasta.
translations.cs: Počítám náš rozpočet na tento měsíc.
translations.da: Jeg beregner vores budget for denne måned.
translations.ja: 今月の私たちの予算を計算しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the verb.
Finite verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate, transitive, selecting a direct object.
Possessive determiner (1st person plural) modifying the noun 'budget'.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'calcule'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase expressing scope/time ('pour le mois').
Definite article (masculine singular) determining 'mois'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu calcules le total du panier.

translations.fr: Tu calcules le total du panier.
translations.es: Estás calculando el total del carrito.
translations.de: Du berechnest den Gesamtpreis des Warenkorbs.
translations.it: Stai calcolando il totale del carrello.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在计算购物车的总额。
translations.yue: 你喺計緊購物車嘅總額。
translations.ru: Ты считаешь итоговую сумму в корзине.
translations.pt: Você está calculando o total do carrinho.
translations.he: אתה מחשב את הסכום הכולל בעגלה.
translations.vi: Bạn đang tính tổng tiền trong giỏ hàng.
translations.nl: Je berekent het totaal van de winkelwagen.
translations.uk: Ти рахуєш загальну суму в кошику.
translations.hi: तुम कार्ट का कुल निकाल रहे हो।
translations.id: Kamu sedang menghitung total belanja di keranjang.
translations.da: Du beregner den samlede pris i kurven.
translations.ja: カートの合計金額を計算しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Finite verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; main predicate, transitive, taking 'le total' as direct object.
Definite article (masculine singular) determining 'total'.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'calcules'.
Preposition as a contraction of 'de + le'; introduces a genitive/complement ('du panier').
Common noun (masculine); complement of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: On doit calculer la part de chacun.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa kal.ky.le la paʁ də ʃa.kœ̃/

translations.fr: On doit calculer la part de chacun.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa kal.ky.le la paʁ də ʃa.kœ̃/
translations.en: We need to calculate each person's share.
translations.es: Necesitamos calcular la parte de cada uno.
translations.de: Wir müssen den Anteil jedes Einzelnen berechnen.
translations.it: Dobbiamo calcolare la quota di ciascuno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们需要计算每个人的份额。
translations.yue: 我哋需要計算每個人嘅份額。
translations.pt: Precisamos calcular a parte de cada um.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לחשב את החלק של כל אחד.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần tính phần của từng người.
translations.ar: نحتاج إلى حساب نصيب كل شخص.
translations.hu: Ki kell számolnunk mindenkinek a részét.
translations.hi: हमें हर व्यक्ति का हिस्सा निकालना है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να υπολογίσουμε το μερίδιο του καθενός.
translations.nb: Vi må beregne hver enkelts andel.
translations.id: Kita perlu menghitung bagian masing-masing orang.
translations.sv: Vi behöver räkna ut varje persons andel.
translations.da: Vi skal beregne hver persons andel.
translations.ja: それぞれの取り分を計算する必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; syntactically 3rd person singular; subject of 'doit'.
Finite verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; modal meaning ('must'); selects an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of the modal 'doit'.
Definite article (feminine singular) determining 'part'.
Common noun (feminine); direct object of the infinitive 'calculer'.
Preposition introducing a complement ('de chacun') indicating distribution/possession.
Indefinite pronoun meaning 'each person'; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Elle calcule les points du match.

translations.fr: Elle calcule les points du match.
translations.es: Ella está calculando los puntos del partido.
translations.it: Sta calcolando i punti della partita.
translations.pt: Ela está calculando os pontos da partida.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang tính điểm của trận đấu.
translations.nl: Ze berekent de punten van de wedstrijd.
translations.hi: वह मैच के अंक गिन रही है।
translations.ja: 彼女は試合の得点を計算しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of the verb.
Finite verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate, transitive.
Definite article (plural) determining 'points'.
Common noun (plural); direct object of 'calcule'.
Preposition as a contraction of 'de + le'; introduces the complement 'match'.
Common noun (masculine); complement of the preposition 'du'.
